summary: Closed the Jeff corpus Phase 4 synthesis after repairing the verdict-table mismatch and verifying the outcome rework that resolved the prior sniff-lens status_without_outcome block.

evidence.command: rg -n "^## Verdict Counts|^## Decision Table|^## Existing Flywheel Surface Map|^## Joshua Decision Points|^## Bead / No-Bead Receipts|^## Three-Q Check" .flywheel/jeff-corpus/v1/learnings/04-adopt-extend-avoid.md

evidence.command: for b in flywheel-e7c2 flywheel-94si flywheel-f2bm flywheel-8qix flywheel-w3pr.3 flywheel-1wbr; do br show "$b" --json | jq -r '.[0] | [.id,.status,.title] | @tsv'; done
evidence.result: new implementation beads are closed, Phase 5 remains in_progress by design, and the sniff-lens rework bead is closed
five outcome sections plus four-lens pass and did/didnt/gaps callback evidence

did: Kept the original 04 synthesis as the Phase 4 decision ledger.
Added the missing AVOID decision row for one-off scripts without runnable proof so the decision table matches the stated verdict counts.
Verified the implementation beads named by the synthesis exist and are closed.
Verified flywheel-w3pr.3 remains the explicit Phase 5 promotion boundary instead of prematurely closing promotion work.
